summary: Completed testing of iteration 5 features: Start Task button bug fix and Request Parts enhancement. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend UI tests verified Start Task workflow and Request Parts form with new fields.
critical_code_review_comments: TaskDetailPage.jsx line 84-98: handleStartTask correctly uses workspaceApi.changeTaskStatus() instead of non-existent startTask()
TaskDetailPage.jsx line 50-51: loadTask correctly uses workspaceApi.getTask(taskId) for direct task loading
RequestPartsPage.jsx: Complete implementation with Company/Location dropdowns (mandatory), Device Details (3 fields), User Name (optional)
RequestPartsPage.jsx line 51-60: Cascading dropdown - Location loads based on Company selection
RequestPartsPage.jsx line 78-83: Frontend validation requires company and location before submission
workspace_routes.py line 1064-1083: create_parts_request stores client_id, location_id, device_name, device_model, device_serial, user_name
workspace_routes.py line 1043-1061: get_parts_requests populates client_name and location_name in responses
seed_data_creation: Created test tasks and parts requests during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified. Start Task button changes task status from 'assigned' to 'in_progress'. Request Parts page has Company/Location (mandatory cascading), Device Details (3 fields), User Name (optional). Backend stores and returns all new fields.

BUG_FIX_START_TASK.description: Start Task button changes task status from assigned to in_progress
evidence: Backend: started_at timestamp is set when task starts
Backend: timeline entry added for status change
Frontend: TaskDetailPage shows Start Task button for 'assigned' tasks
Frontend: Clicking Start Task changes status badge to 'in progress'
Frontend: Button changes to 'Complete & Submit Entry' after starting

ENHANCEMENT_REQUEST_PARTS.description: Request Parts page with Company, Location, Device Details, User Name fields
evidence: Location dropdown (mandatory) - cascading, loads based on company from /api/workspace/clients/{id}/locations
Location shows 'Select company first' when no company selected
Device Name input field with placeholder 'e.g., HP ProBook Laptop'
Model input field with placeholder 'e.g., 450 G8'
Serial Number input field with placeholder 'e.g., SN-ABC123'
User Name input (optional) with placeholder 'Name of the user/person'
Frontend validation - shows error if Company or Location not selected
Backend stores: client_id, location_id, device_name, device_model, device_serial, user_name
Backend returns: client_name, location_name in GET /api/workspace/parts-requests

playwright_test_results.admin_login: PASSED - Admin can login and access dashboard
playwright_test_results.engineer_login: PASSED - Engineer can login and access My Tasks
playwright_test_results.start_task_button: PASSED - Button visible for assigned tasks, click changes status to in_progress
playwright_test_results.request_parts_form: PASSED - All new fields present (Company, Location, Device Details, User Name)
playwright_test_results.cascading_dropdown: PASSED - Location dropdown enabled after Company selection
playwright_test_results.form_validation: PASSED - Error shown when submitting without Company/Location
